brand.name: EthioMLS
brand.tagline: Buy and rent verified property in Addis Ababa — for Ethiopian diaspora and global investors
brand.motto: Live it, lease it, or watch it rise — in Addis Ababa.

home.lede: Verified homes, off-plan projects, and commercial spaces across Addis Ababa — in four languages.

filters.title: Filters
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by area, project, or keyword

compliance.escrowBody: Buyer deposits are held in a locked bank account and released by verified construction milestones under Proclamation 1357/2024.
compliance.foreignClearanceBody: Residential purchases by foreign nationals follow Proclamation 1388/2025 clearance and investment rules.
compliance.offPlanWarningBody: Developer allocations for this off-plan property are locked in a closed bank escrow account. Funds are released only after certified construction stages are verified under Proclamation 1357/2024.

search.title: Tell us what you are looking for
search.lede: Answer three short prompts. Your budget stays balanced across ETB and USD using today’s NBE day-rate proxy.

prompts.cluster: Which Addis Ababa sub-city cluster do you prefer?

intent.buyHint: Completed or ready homes for sale

search.simpleLede: Choose intent, area, and budget — then browse matching homes.

completion.hint: Filters off-plan units and projects by verified construction progress.

ai.lede: Describe what you want in plain language — we will map it to intent, area cluster, and budget.
ai.placeholder: e.g. Looking to rent a 2-bedroom near Bole under 80,000 ETB/month
ai.error: Could not interpret that search. Try the fields above.

auth.title: Sign in to EthioMLS
auth.lede: Sign in with email or Ethiopian mobile and password. Clients abroad can use email; SMS is only for new devices with a local phone. Add more details later in your profile.
auth.identifierHint: Diaspora clients: use the email on your account. Local users: Ethiopian mobile (+251 9… / 7…).
auth.identifierClientHint: Abroad? Use your email. In Ethiopia? Use a local mobile — we will SMS a code.
auth.phoneHint: Local numbers only (+251 9… / +251 7…). International numbers are not accepted.
auth.codeSent: We sent a verification code by SMS.
auth.newDeviceHint: New device detected — enter the SMS code to finish signing in. Trusted devices skip this next time.
auth.mockHint: SMS is in mock mode — use the debug code below.
auth.resetEmailOnly: Password reset currently needs an Ethiopian mobile. If you registered with email only, use the password you set or continue with Google.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Min. 8 characters. SMS is only for new devices with a local phone — email clients skip it.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.lede: Enter your Ethiopian mobile and a new password. We will SMS a code to confirm.
reset.codeSent: We sent a reset code by SMS. Enter it to save your new password.

role.label: Your role
role.hint: Pick one role for this account. You cannot change it later.
role.required: Choose one role to create your account.
role.locked: Your role was set at signup and cannot be changed.
role.clientHint: Browse homes — sign up with email (abroad) or Ethiopian mobile.
role.ownerHint: List your own home for sale or rent.

developer.hint: Trade name and Tax Identification Number (TIN) are required. We verify your TIN on etrade.gov.et.
developer.tinRequired: Enter a valid 10-digit Tax Identification Number (TIN).
developer.tinHint: Verified against the e-Trade business license checker:

rolesIndex.title: Choose your role
rolesIndex.lede: Client, broker, owner, developer, or admin — each hub highlights the tools you need.

client.title: Find your next home
client.lede: Browse verified listings and projects. Sign in to unlock contact numbers, visits, and 360° tours.

broker.title: List and manage inventory
broker.lede: Publish properties for clients, keep contacts ready for admin audit, and track the market from one place.

owner.title: Sell or rent your property
owner.lede: List your own home with photos and documents. Every submission waits for admin audit before it goes live.

developer.title: Showcase projects and off-plan units
developer.lede: Publish escrow-backed off-plan inventory with the full document pack: org credentials, floor plan, title or lease, permit, escrow letter, unit photos, and Fayda verify for your company rep.

admin.title: Audit and import the market
admin.lede: Scrape Telegram and websites, add listings to pending review, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.

developer.title: Publish escrow-backed inventory
developer.lede: Track readiness, submit the full document pack, follow units through admin review, and mark apartments Available, Reserved, or Sold from your public developer page — inventory status is separate from publish/audit.
developer.readinessProfileNeeded: No developer profile yet — trade name and registration are collected on first inventory submit.
developer.readinessFaydaOk: Fayda eSignet verified for your account
developer.readinessFaydaNeeded: Fayda verify still needed (demo verify on the inventory form until RP credentials are live)
developer.packLede: Every unfinished unit needs org docs, floor plan, title or lease, MUD permit, escrow letter, photos, and Fayda — AI can prefill fields from uploads.
developer.packFayda: Fayda eSignet for the company representative
developer.pendingEmpty: No listings waiting for audit. Submit off-plan inventory to get started.
developer.publishedEmpty: Nothing published yet — approved inventory will appear here.

admin.title: Review, audit, and publish
admin.lede: Work the pending queue, add listings before you verify them, clear collision alerts, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.
admin.addListingHint: Enters pending review — audit and verify before publish.
admin.checklistLede: Every approval must pass identity, ownership, price, location, media, permit, escrow, contact, and fraud screens.
admin.readyEmpty: Nothing audited yet — approve a pending listing to see it here.
admin.toolsScrapeReviewHint: Approve scraped listings and send HaHu invite SMS.
admin.toolsImportsHint: Telegram, websites, Facebook pages, and sales-kit uploads.
admin.toolsAlertsHint: Jump to collision and system alerts waiting for you.
admin.toolsProjectsHint: Review developer projects before they go public.
admin.toolsQueueHint: Pending, drafts, and verified listings ready to publish.

adminAudit.title: Client-protection audit
adminAudit.lede: Complete every check before approving, or reject to draft with a written reason. Approval does not publish — use Publish after audit passes.
adminAudit.notesPlaceholder: Why you approve or reject. Reject: min. 5 characters. Approve: min. 10.
adminAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this listing.
adminAudit.rejectedToDraft: Listing rejected and returned to draft.
adminAudit.rejectNeedsNotes: Reject needs 5+ characters, or tap a quick reason above.
adminAudit.approveNeedsChecks: Approve needs every check ticked and a 10+ character reason.
adminAudit.publishNeedsApprove: Publish unlocks after you approve the audit (check all + reason).

attach.title: Attach to role
attach.lede: Link this listing to a developer, broker, or owner account so the queue stays organized.
attach.unassigned: Not attached to a party account
attach.deactivateLede: Turns off their login and moves this listing to draft. Choose a reason.
attach.deactivated: Developer deactivated and listing moved to draft.
attach.deactivateNeedReason: Choose a reason from the dropdown first.
attach.deactivateNoDeveloper: No developer is attached to this listing.

enrich.title: Enrich pending listing
enrich.lede: Upload a sales PDF, DOCX, or images to parse fields into this listing, or attach gallery / 360° photos before you approve.
enrich.filesHint: PDF, DOCX, or images · up to 3 files · used to fill title, price, beds, and more
enrich.editReasonPlaceholder: Why are you changing this listing? (min. 10 characters)
enrich.editReasonRequired: Add an edit reason before applying.
enrich.photosHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · becomes the card cover and detail gallery
enrich.as360Label: Also use as 360° virtual tour frames
enrich.applied: Listing fields updated from parsed data.
enrich.needDraft: Parse a file first, then apply.

projectAudit.title: Project client-protection audit
projectAudit.lede: Off-plan projects must pass every check before going live. Approval does not publish — use Publish project after audit passes.
projectAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this project.
projectAudit.rejectedToDraft: Project rejected and returned to draft.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.lede: Your Ethiopian mobile number is your login. Email is optional and used only for contact updates.
profile.phoneLocked: Phone is your sign-in ID and cannot be changed here.
profile.emailHint: Not required for signup — add it so we can reach you about listings and offers.

password.title: Change password
password.lede: Enter your current password, then choose a new one.
password.ledeSet: Set a password so you can also sign in with your phone.

listingDetail.noPhone: No phone on file — admin will add one after audit.
listingDetail.signUpForContact: Sign up with your Ethiopian mobile number to see the contact phone and request a visit.
listingDetail.signUpForTour: Create a free account to open the 360° virtual tour.
listingDetail.tourComingSoonLede: A panoramic walkthrough has not been uploaded for this listing yet. Check back after the agent or developer adds one.

imports.title: Import sources
imports.lede: Add public Telegram channels, Facebook Pages, websites, or upload sales kits below. Scraped and kit-imported listings stay pending until admin audit. Link inventory to a developer or broker account so they can claim login via Reset password.
imports.addLede: Paste a Telegram handle (e.g. @gechocommission8), a Facebook Page URL (facebook.com/YourPage), or a website URL. Tag corridor off-plan sources with notes containing corridor-offplan.
imports.label: Label (optional)
imports.cliHint: Scrape all corridors: npm run scrape:offplan-ads · one corridor: --corridor=east
imports.empty: No sources yet. Add a Telegram channel, Facebook Page, or website above.
imports.deleteConfirm: Delete “{label}” and permanently remove its {count} scraped listing(s)? Curated project inventory is kept.

scrapeReview.title: Scrape invite review
scrapeReview.lede: Approve scraped listings before HaHu SMS goes out. Left: raw post. Right: Gemini-structured fields and Amharic message preview. Manual mode is the default; use ?mode=auto on ingest to skip this queue.
scrapeReview.empty: No scrapes waiting for invite approval.
scrapeReview.phoneMissing: No contact phone — invite SMS cannot be sent.
scrapeReview.sendToAuditFailed: Could not send to pending audit.
scrapeReview.accountCreated: Created {role} account “{label}” — they claim login via Reset password.
scrapeReview.sortedOldestFirst: Oldest first — review long-waiting imports first

salesKit.title: Sales kit → role account
salesKit.lede: Upload a developer/broker sales PDF or DOCX. Extract listings, attach them to an existing developer or broker account, or create one with their phone so they can sign in via Reset password.
salesKit.createNew: Create a new developer/broker account for this kit
salesKit.filesHint: PDF, DOCX, or images · up to 3 files · 4 MB each
salesKit.parseFailed: Could not parse the sales kit.
salesKit.needFiles: Choose at least one sales kit file.
salesKit.needAccount: Select a developer or broker account.
salesKit.needPhone: Enter a phone number for the new account.

dashboard.title: Market desk
dashboard.lede: Live inventory health across Addis Ababa sub-cities, review queues, and Gemini translation coverage.
dashboard.adminLede: Full ops desk: listings, page views, HaHu SMS push status, and the live deploy version.

building.showreelHint: Drag to orbit · click a floor
building.scrollHint: Scroll the stack or tap a floor

listings.title: Listings
listings.lede: Browse verified homes and commercial spaces for sale or rent across Addis Ababa — built for diaspora buyers and investors worldwide.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lede: Track escrow-backed off-plan and under-construction projects in Addis Ababa with clear unit inventory.
projects.selectUnit: Inspect a floor, then select a unit to see MLS ID and property details.

developers.title: Developers
developers.lede: Explore verified corporate developers and licensed delala partners listing inventory for diaspora and investors on EthioMLS.
developers.emptyListings: No published properties for this developer yet.

inventory.heading: Unit inventory
inventory.lede: Projects and buildings grouped by unit type, with Available / Reserved / Sold counts. Owning developers can update status here.
inventory.editLede: Mark each apartment Available, Reserved, or Sold. This does not change whether the listing is published.

pages.comingOnline: Directory coming online — sample inventory below.
pages.emptyHint: Full catalogue connects when your PostgreSQL database is linked.
pages.emptyDirectory: No published records yet. Run `npx prisma db seed` to populate demo inventory.

consent.title: Consent to contact broker
consent.body: Broker telephone numbers stay masked for privacy. Confirm the Consent Gate to create a routed lead and unlock the contact line for this listing only.
consent.checkbox: I consent to share my enquiry and receive the broker contact details for this listing.
consent.mustTick: Tick the Consent Gate checkbox to continue.
consent.routeFailed: Could not complete secure lead routing.

pwa.installBody: Add EthioMLS to your home screen for faster access.
pwa.iosHint: On iPhone: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwa.chromeMenuHint: Open the browser menu (⋮) and choose Install app / Add to Home screen.
